# Emoji normalization: emoji codepoints → English CLDR short names.
# Modifier/ZWJ codepoints map to empty string (stripped).
# Values are stored without spacing; build.rs prepends a leading space
# for word boundary separation.
# Format: <emoji_char>\t<english_name> (empty value = delete)
# Generated by: scripts/generate_process_map.py
‍

™	trade_mark
